mapper.select:
SELECT CC012 AS supplierName, CAST(COUNT(*) AS INT) AS count, SUBSTRING(CREATE_DATE, 1, ${type}) AS date FROM PURCC
CC009 = 'Y'
AND CC012 IN
#{item}
AND SUBSTRING(CREATE_DATE, 1, ${type}) BETWEEN SUBSTRING(#{start_time}, 1, ${type}) AND SUBSTRING(#{end_time}, 1, ${type})
GROUP BY CC012, SUBSTRING(CREATE_DATE, 1, ${type}) ORDER BY SUBSTRING(CREATE_DATE, 1, ${type})

SELECT CC012 AS supplierName, CAST(SUM(CC013) AS INT) AS count, SUBSTRING ( CREATE_DATE, 1, ${type} ) AS date FROM PURCC
CC009 = 'Y'
AND CC012 IN
#{item}
AND SUBSTRING ( CREATE_DATE, 1, ${type} ) BETWEEN SUBSTRING ( #{start_time}, 1, ${type} ) AND SUBSTRING ( #{end_time}, 1, ${type} )
GROUP BY CC012, SUBSTRING ( CREATE_DATE, 1, ${type} ) ORDER BY SUBSTRING ( CREATE_DATE, 1, ${type} )

SELECT SUBSTRING(PURCD.CREATE_DATE, 1, ${type}) AS date, CC012 supplierName, CAST(SUM(CD018) AS INT) AS count FROM PURCD LEFT JOIN PURCC ON CD001 = CC001 AND CD002 = CC002
CC009 = 'Y'
AND CC012 IN
#{item}
AND SUBSTRING(PURCD.CREATE_DATE, 1, ${type}) BETWEEN SUBSTRING ( #{start_time}, 1, ${type} ) AND SUBSTRING ( #{end_time}, 1, ${type} )
GROUP BY CC012, SUBSTRING(PURCD.CREATE_DATE, 1, ${type}) ORDER BY SUBSTRING(PURCD.CREATE_DATE, 1, ${type})

SELECT TG021 supplierName, CAST(COUNT(*) AS INT) AS count, SUBSTRING(PURTG.CREATE_DATE, 1, ${type}) AS date FROM PURTG LEFT JOIN PURCC ON TG001=CC001 AND TG002=CC002
TG013 = 'Y'
AND TG021 IN
#{item}
AND SUBSTRING(PURTG.CREATE_DATE, 1, ${type}) BETWEEN SUBSTRING ( #{start_time}, 1, ${type} ) AND SUBSTRING ( #{end_time}, 1, ${type} )
GROUP BY TG021, SUBSTRING(PURTG.CREATE_DATE, 1, ${type}) ORDER BY SUBSTRING(PURTG.CREATE_DATE, 1, ${type})
SELECT DISTINCT RTRIM(CC012) AS supplierName FROM PURCC
